parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, workflow_name, payload)
VALUES ('media_normalized', 'IGOR_02_Media_Normalizer', $1::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ phone: $json.phone, msgId: $json.msgId, message_type: $json.messageType, normalized_text: $json.normalized_text, safety_flags: $json.safety_flags, should_handoff: $json.should_handoff, handoff_reason: $json.handoff_reason, test_run_id: $json.test_run_id }) }}
